# normal

normal is the house music project of Yashwanth Maheshwaram, based in Bangalore, India.

Warm, groove-led house and Detroit-leaning dance music — built for the floor. Genre range: house, deep house, Detroit house, acid house, with influences from Chicago house, Detroit techno, breakbeat, disco, and electro.

Tagline: *To dance is a privilege; to make you do, is mine.*

## Project facts

- Artist name: normal (always lowercase)
- Real name: Yashwanth Maheshwaram
- Based in: Bangalore, India
- Imprint: Normal Records ("Detroit in spirit")
- Primary site: https://yashwanthm.github.io/normal/

## Platforms

- SoundCloud: https://soundcloud.com/normaldj
- Bandcamp: https://normaldj.bandcamp.com
- Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/artist/normal/1804288244
- Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/0ow5fWEBIvvrDVDai6No2a
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/normal.dj

## Releases

| Track | Released | Genre | Bandcamp |
|---|---|---|---|
| cognite | 2026-05-19 | Acid house | https://normaldj.bandcamp.com/track/cognite |
| gain it easy | 2026-04-23 | Deep house | https://normaldj.bandcamp.com/track/normal-gain-it-easy |
| break it down | 2026-06-01 | House | https://normaldj.bandcamp.com/track/normal-break-it-down |
| motor city moves | 2025-03-24 | Detroit house | https://normaldj.bandcamp.com/track/motor-city-moves |
| foster the floor | 2026-04-01 | House | https://normaldj.bandcamp.com/track/foster-the-floor |
| intent | 2025-12-10 | Deep house | https://normaldj.bandcamp.com/track/intent |

## Contact

Bookings: DM @normal.dj on Instagram.

## Influences (musical reference points)

Moodymann, Theo Parrish, Cajmere, Mike Dunn, Mike Huckaby, Rick Wilhite, Louie Vega, Kenny Dope.
